project: GOBLIN - Global Network on Large-Scale, Cross-domain and Multilingual Open Knowledge Graphs
title: GOBLIN - Global Network on Large-Scale, Cross-domain and Multilingual Open Knowledge Graphs

metadata.program: European Cooperation in Science and Technology (COST)

czech_title.label: Czech title
czech_title.text: Velke jazykove modely a znalostni grafy

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: The project will contribute to the activities of COST Action CA23147 - GOBLIN - in the areas related to using large language models (LLM) and advanced machine learning methods for engineering knowledge graphs (KG) across languages and, in the opposite direction, employing KG for enhancing reliability and interpretability of LLM, mitigating their biases and hallucinations, and evaluating new generations of LLM.

team_members.label: Team members
team_members.text: Smrz Pavel, doc. RNDr., Ph.D. (DCGM) – research leader
